def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # 1. Sort by (code, date) for per-code rolling operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # 2. delta(returns, 3) - 3-period delta of returns (per-code)
    delta_returns = delta(pl.col('returns'), periods=3)

    # 3. Cross-sectional rank of delta returns
    rank_delta = rank(delta_returns).over('date')

    # 4. correlation(open, volume, 10) - 10-day rolling correlation (per-code)
    corr_ov = rolling_corr(pl.col('open'), pl.col('volume'), window=10)

    # 5. Combine: (-1 * rank(delta(returns, 3))) * correlation(open, volume, 10)
    factor = (-1 * rank_delta) * corr_ov

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
